info.title: Convert C# Models, ViewModels and DTOs into their TypeScript equivalents
info.description: Convert C# Models, ViewModels and DTOs into their TypeScript equivalents.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Convert C# Models, ViewModels and DTOs into their TypeScript equivalents

commands.name: init
commands.description:
Initialize - create
configuration file in
current directory

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output file or directory
path

options.name: --use-tabs
options.description: Use tabs for indentation

options.name: --tab-size
options.description: Number of spaces per tab

options.name: --skip-export
options.description: Skip 'export' keyword

options.name: --use-kebab-case
options.description:
Use kebab case for output
file names

options.name: --append-model-suffix
options.description:
Append '.model' suffix to
output file names

options.name: --clear-output-directory
options.description: Clear output directory

options.name: --angular-mode
options.description:
Use Angular style
conventions

options.name: --partial-override
options.description:
Override only part of output
file between marker comments

options.name: --preserve-casing
options.description:
Don't convert field names to
camel case

options.name: --preserve-interface-prefix
options.description:
Don't remove interface
prefixes

options.name: --convert-dates-to
options.description:
Set output type for dates
Allowed values are: String,
Date, Union

options.name: --convert-nullables-to
options.description:
Set output type for
nullables
Allowed values are: Null,
Undefined

options.name: --import-generation
options.description:
Enable import generation
Allowed values are: None,
Simple

options.name: --quotation-mark
options.description:
Set quotation marks for
import statements &
identifiers
Allowed values are: Double,
Single

options.name: --append-new-line
options.description:
Append new line to end of
file (removes TSLint
warning)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information
